snap.label: CalFresh
snap.notes: Most households certify every 12 months. Semi-Annual Reports (SAR-7) are due at 6 months but are not a recertification — they are a mid-period income report.
snap.mid_cert_note: CalFresh also asks for a mid-certification report (the SAR-7) around the 6-month mark. This is not a renewal — you stay enrolled — but turning it in keeps your benefits going without a pause. Your approval notice shows the due date.

medicaid.label: Medi-Cal
medicaid.notes: Annual renewal. The renewal is usually set for the 11th month after the month you applied or last renewed.

snap.label: SNAP (food benefits)
snap.notes: Most households in Texas are certified for 6 months. Households where everyone is elderly or has a disability with no earned income may get a 36-month period. Your approval notice shows your exact period.

medicaid.label: Medicaid
medicaid.notes: Annual renewal. Texas usually mails a renewal notice about 90 days before the due date.

snap.label: SNAP (food assistance)
snap.notes: Most Florida households are certified for 6 months. Households where everyone is elderly or has a disability with no earned income may get a 24-month period. Your approval notice shows your exact period.

medicaid.label: Medicaid
medicaid.notes: Annual renewal handled by the Department of Children and Families.

snap.label: SNAP
snap.notes: Most New York households are certified for 12 months. Households where everyone is elderly or has a disability may be certified for up to 24 or 36 months. Your recertification packet shows your exact period.

medicaid.label: Medicaid
medicaid.notes: Annual renewal. Your local Department of Social Services usually sends a notice 60 to 90 days before the due date.

snap.label: Nutrition Assistance (SNAP)
snap.notes: Most Arizona households renew every 6 months. Households where everyone is 60 or older with no earned income may get a 36-month period. Your Notice of Expiration shows your exact period.

medicaid.label: AHCCCS (Medicaid)
medicaid.notes: Annual renewal. AHCCCS usually sends a notice about 90 days before coverage expires.
